Oracc: CAMS/GKAB — CAMS Geography of Knowledge Corpus

BagM Beih. 02, 115 [ration list][via cams/gkab]

Obverse
o 1o 1

ša₂-ṭar ša₂ UZU ti-ik-ka-MEŠ ša₂ lu₂GALA-MEŠ ITI-su-MEŠ

(o 1) Written document about the monthly meat from the neck for the kalûs.

o 22

md60—EN-šu₂-nu u A-MEŠ-šu₂ 3 mi-šil ti-ik-ka

(o 2) Anu-belšunu and his sons: 3 half of necks.

o 33

mdum-qi₂—d60 A ša₂ md60—DINiṭ 2

(o 3) Dumqi-Anu, son of Anu-uballiṭ: 2.

o 44

mi-dat—d60 A ša₂ msu-mut—d60! 1

(o 4) Idat-Anu, son of Sumut-Anu: 1.

o 55

mi-dat—d60 u md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU A-MEŠ ša₂ md60—DUMU—MUnu 2.1/2

(o 5) Idat-Anu and Anu-ahhe-iddin, sons of Anu-mar-ittannu: 2 1/2.

o 66

⸢A⸣-šu₂ ša₂ mdna-na-a—MU A ša₂ mKI—d60—ḪE₂.NUN mi-šil [...]

(o 6) (Illut-Anu), son of Nanaya-iddin, son of Itti-Anu-nuhšu: half [...].

o 77

msu-mut—d60 A ša₂ md60—DUMU—MUnu 1 meš-šal₂ [...]1

(o 7) Sumut-Anu, son of Anu-mar-ittannu: 1 half [...].

o 88

mni-din-tu₄—d60 A ša₂ mNU.TEŠ₂ u md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU A ša₂ mdUTU—MUnu 2  ; 20 TA 302

(o 8) Nidintu-Anu, son of Labaši and Anu-ahhe-iddin, son of Šamaš-ittannu: 2; 20 (days) out of 30.

o 99

PAP 9 ti-ik-ka ša₂ UDU.NITA₂ dŠU₂ i-ṭar-ri [...] x

(o 9) Total: ... 9 necks of sheep of Marduk [...] ....

o 1010

UZU ti-ik-ka-MEŠ ša₂ GU₄ x [...] x3

(o 10) The meat of ox's necks [...]

o 1111

mi-šil ina lib₃-bi-šu₂-nu x x [...]

(o 11) half from among them [...]

o 1212

i?-ṭar-ri ana muḫ-ḫi m[...]

(o 12) ... concerning [PN ...]

o 1313

ša₂ saḫ-le-e ša₂ x EN? x [...]

(o 13) of cress of ... [...]

o 1414

ša₂ mni-din-tu₄—d60 A-šu₂ 1 ma-ḫat mx [...]

(o 14) of Nidintu-Anu, his son: 1 twelfth of a shekel; [PN, son]

o 1515

[ša₂?] mdum-qi₂—d60 2 ma-ḫat m[...]

(o 15) [of] Dumqi-Anu: 2 twelfths of a shekel; [PN, son]

Reverse
r 1r 1

ša₂ mi-dat—d60 A ša₂! msu-mut—[d60 ...]

(r 1) of Idat-Anu, son of Sumut-[Anu ...]

r 22

msu-mut—d60 u ŠEŠ-MEŠ-šu₂ u A-⸢MEŠ⸣ [...]

(r 2) Sumut-Anu and his brothers and sons [...]

r 33

KA₂ 2-u₂ msu-mut—d60 A TA x [...]

(r 3) second gate, Sumut-Anu ... [...]

r 44

mni-din-tu₄—d60 A ša₂ mNU.TEŠ₂ 1 ma-ḫat [...]

(r 4) Nidintu-Anu, son of Labaši: 1 twelfth of a shekel [PN,]

r 55

A ša₂ mtat-tan-nu 1 ma-ḫat m?x x [...]

(r 5) son of Tattannu: 1 twelth of a shekel; PN [...].

r 66

ŠAM₂ ti-ik-ka-MEŠ u ša₂ UDU.NITA₂ dŠU₂ x [...]

(r 6) Price of the necks and of the sheep of Marduk ... [...]

r 77

TA lib₃-bi it-ta-din md60—EN-šu₂-nu ana? mi-dat—⸢d60⸣ x ⸢GIN₂?⸣ [...]

(r 7) from which Anu-belšunu gave to Idat-Anu: ... shekel [...].

r 88

mi-dat—d60 A ša₂ msu-mut—d60 1/2 GIN₂

(r 8) Idat-Anu, son of Sumut-Anu: 1/2 shekel.

r 99

mdum-qi₂—d60 A ša₂ md60—DINiṭ 1/2 GIN₂ 4 ma-ḫat

(r 9) Dumqi-Anu, son of Anu-uballiṭ: 1/2 shekel and 4 twelfths of a shekel.

r 1010

mni-din-tu₄—d60 A ša₂ mNU.TEŠ₂ u md60—ŠEŠ-MEŠ—MU 1/2 GIN₂ 4 ⸢ma-ḫat⸣

(r 10) Nidintu-Anu, son of Labaši and Anu-ahhe-iddin: 1/2 shekel, 4 twelfths of a shekel.

r 1111

mil-lut—d60 A ša₂ mdna-na-a—MU 8.1/2 <GIN₂> 2 ma!-ḫat

(r 11) Illut-Anu, son of Nanaya-iddin: 8 1/2 (shekel) 2 twelfths of a shekel.

Top
t.e. 1t.e. 1

ša₂ id-din md60—EN-šu₂-nu ana mni-din-tu₄—d60 A mta-nit-tu₄—d60 1/2 GIN₂

(t.e. 1) What Anu-belšunu gave to Nidintu-Anu, son (of) Tanittu-Anu (is) 1/2 shekel.

t.e. 22

<<DIŠ>> mša₂-ḫi-il-la-a ina ŠU-MIN mni-din-tu₄—d60 A-šu₂ 4 GUR x mi-šil x x GIN₂

(t.e. 2) Šahillaya (put) from the hands of Nidintu-Anu, his son: 4 kurru ... half ... shekel.

1meš-šal₂ is written after an erasure and seems to be for mašlu

220 TA 30 written between lines 8 and 9

3erasure just after GU₄
